description: Install dependencies and verify the existing project builds successfully with Bun.
steps: Run 'bun install' in /projects/sandbox/nextjs-medication-reminder to install all dependencies
Run 'bun run build' to verify the project compiles without errors
If build fails, diagnose and fix any issues
acceptance_criteria: 'bun run build' completes successfully with exit code 0
verification: Run 'bun run build' and confirm exit code 0
findings: bun install completed successfully (368 packages, 4.86s). Lockfile migrated from package-lock.json to bun.lock. bun run build completed with exit code 0 using Turbopack. Non-fatal warnings about worker_threads.Worker options (stdout, stderr, resourceLimits) not yet implemented in Bun were emitted but did not affect the build. All routes compiled and static pages generated successfully.
